base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of menu_font_letters_digits — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 metroid. Menu pixel-font — A-Z + 0-9 used across title/password/HUD. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Menu pixel-font — A-Z + 0-9 used across title/password/HUD
